#### What's great

The real product insight here is the handoff, not the chatbot itself. If a team can step in at the right moment without breaking the conversation, the AI becomes much more useful in practice. Most businesses don’t need a flashy agent; they need something that saves time and still feels reliable.

#### What needs improvement

All good

#### vs Alternatives

This is the kind of AI setup that actually makes sense for small businesses. The most useful systems are usually the ones that start with a website URL, handle repetitive questions, capture leads, and hand off to a human when needed.

meme_f4rmer
Elena

@angelaaa Hey! What makes AI Chat stand out is that it brings together all the top AI models like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, and more in one place. You don’t have to switch between tools or tabs anymore.

Plus, we have built our own model, Husky AI, which is different because it also pulls info from Telegram channels, not just the web. That is super helpful because Telegram is a key source of real-time news. [...] George
AI Lawyer

AI Lawyer

Hey Product Hunt! 👋

We’re excited to launch AI Chat - a powerful all-in-one AI workspace, built around our own unique model, Husky AI. 🐾

Husky AI is a custom AI Search Engine that combines Web + Telegram channels' content to deliver real-time, local, and uncensored answers - especially valuable in regions where Telegram is a key source of information.

On top of that, AI Chat includes ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek and more into a single, seamless interface. Ask once, compare top AIs side by side, and save time, money, and tabs. Perfect for work, research, writing, and deep search - all in one place. ⚡️

🎁 Use code PH30OFF to get 30% off your first payment
